use reqwest::Client;
use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::OnceCell;

static CLIENT: OnceCell<Arc<Client>> = OnceCell::const_new();

async fn get_client() -> Arc<Client> {
    CLIENT
        .get_or_init(|| async {
            Arc::new(Client::builder().build().expect("client"))
        })
        .await
        .clone()
}

// GOOD: reuse shared client
async fn call_api(url: &str) -> Result<String, reqwest::Error> {
    let client = get_client().await;
    let resp = client.get(url).send().await?;
    let body = resp.text().await?;
    Ok(body)
}
